items.title: Frederic Edwin Church’s Sublime
items.summary: Benjamin Moser on a new biography of the Hudson River painter, allegations against Cape Town’s SMAC Gallery, and more.

items.title: Cape Town Gallery Accused of Withholding Pay and Artworks
items.summary: An artist who left SMAC Gallery late last year took to social media with claims of delayed payments and missing works.

items.title: Beer With a Painter: Keltie Ferris
items.summary: “I am playing with the building blocks of painting,” the artist told me at his studio in Woodstock, where he experiments with gestural compositions and monumental body prints.

items.title: Remembering Bruno Lucchesi, Pat Oliphant, and Edward Lucie-Smith
items.summary: This week, we honor a figurative sculptor, a political cartoonist who revolutionized the form, and a prolific poet and writer.
